citations.narrative:
During this inspection, the licensee had 1676 birds at their site, but their current license is issued and approved for a
maximum of 1650 animals. The USDA license authorizes a specific number of animals to ensure the facility is capable of
providing care for that number of animals. A licensee must obtain a new license before any change resulting in more than
the authorized number of animals on hand at any single point in time during the period of licensure. The licensee must
maintain no more than the maximum number of animals that his USDA license allows.
Correct by: 07/01/2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
n

narrative:
2.1(b)(2) 
   
Requirements and application 
During this inspection, the licensee had 1676 birds at their site, but their current license is issued and approved for a 
maximum of 1650 animals. The USDA license authorizes a specific number of animals to ensure the facility is capable of 
providing care for that number of animals. A licensee must obtain a new license before any change resulting in more than 
the authorized number of animals on hand at any single point in time during the period of licensure. The licensee must 
maintain no more than the maximum number of animals that his USDA license allows. 
Correct by: 07/01/2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with the licensee.
